title: Uyire Uyire Lyrics Bombay
stanzas: <div>Uyire Uyire Lyrics Bombay

Uyire uyire vandhu
ennodu kalandhuvidu.
uyire uyire ennai
unnodu kalandhuvidu

ninaive ninaive  endhan
nenjodu kalandhuvidu.
nilave nilave indha
vinnodu kalandhuvidu.

kadhal irundhaal
endhan kannodu kalandhuvidu.
kaalam thaduththaal ennai
mannodu kalandhuvidu.

Uyire uyire vandhu
ennodu kalandhuvidu.
uyire uyire ennai
unnodu kalandhuvidu

ninaive ninaive  endhan
nenjodu kalandhuvidu.
nilave nilave indha
vinnodu kalandhuvidu.

en swasakaatru
varum paadhai paarthu
uyir thaangi naan iruppen.

malar konda penmai
vaaraamal ponaal
malai meedhu theekkulippen.

en uyir pogum ponaalum
thuyar illai penne
adharkkaagavaa paadinen.

varum edhirkaalam unmeedhu
pazhi podum penne
adharkkaakathaan vaadinen.

mudhalaa mudivaa
adhai unkaiyil koduthuvitten.

uyire uyire indru
unnodu kalandhuvitten.
urave urave indru
en vaasal kadanthuvitten.

ninaive ninaive undhan
nenjodu niraindhuvitten.
kanave kanave undhan
kannodu karaindhuvitten.

kadhal irundhaal
endhan kannodu kalandhuvidu.
kaalam thaduththaal ennai
mannodu kalandhuvidu.

Uyire uyire vandhu
ennodu kalandhuvidu.
uyire uyire ennai
unnodu kalandhuvidu

ninaive ninaive  endhan
nenjodu kalandhuvidu.

or paarvai paarthe
uyir thandha penmai
vaaraamal poividumaa.

oru kannil konjam
vali vandha maadhu
maru kannum thoongidumaa

naan karum paarai
pala thaandi neraaga
vandhen kannaalan
mugam paarkkave.

en kadunkaaval palathaandi
kaattraaga vandhen
kannaa un kural kaetkave.

adadaa adadaa indru
kanneerum thiththikindrathe.

Uyire uyire vandhu
ennodu kalandhuvidu.
uyire uyire ennai
unnodu kalandhuvidu

ninaive ninaive  endhan
nenjodu kalandhuvidu.
nilave nilave indha
vinnodu kalandhuvidu.

mazhai pol mazhai pol
vandhu mannoodu vilundhuvitten.
manam pol manam pol
undhan oonodu uraindhuvitten.

uyire uyire indru
unnodu kalandhuvitten.
ninaive ninaive undhan
nenjodu niraindhuvitten.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Uyire Uyire'?

'Uyire Uyire' expresses deep emotions of love and connection, highlighting the longing between lovers.

In which movie is 'Uyire Uyire' featured?

The song is featured in the movie Bombay, which explores themes of love and societal issues.

Who are the singers of 'Uyire Uyire'?

The song is sung by renowned artists Hariharan and K.S. Chitra.

Who composed the music for 'Uyire Uyire'?

The music for the song was composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

When was 'Uyire Uyire' released?

'Uyire Uyire' was released on March 10, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Uyire Uyire' is a poignant love song that encapsulates the emotional turmoil and beauty of romantic relationships. In the context of Bombay, it reflects the characters' deep connections amidst societal challenges. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a timeless classic. This duet not only showcases the incredible talents of Hariharan and K.S. Chitra but also highlights A.R. Rahman's exceptional musical prowess.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Uyire Uyire from Bombay is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and K.S. Chitra, paired with A.R. Rahman's enchanting composition, this song transcends time and resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to evoke powerful emotions even decades after its release.
stanzaMeanings: My life has come and merged with you. My life has come and merged with me with you.
Thoughts, thoughts have merged with my heart. Moon, moon has merged with this sky.
If love exists, it has merged with my eyes. If time passes, it has merged with my mind.
My life has come and merged with you. My life has come and merged with me with you.
Thoughts, thoughts have merged with my heart. Moon, moon has merged with this sky.
I will stay alive by watching the path of my breath.
If a flower-like girl doesn't come, I will suffer on the mountain.
Even if my life goes away, I have no sorrow, girl, I sang for that.
The coming future will bring you pain, girl, I sang for that.
I have given you the beginning and the end in your hands.
Today, I have merged with you. Today, I have crossed my threshold with you.
Thoughts, thoughts have filled your heart. Dreams, dreams have filled your eyes.
If love exists, it has merged with my eyes. If time passes, it has merged with my mind.
My life has come and merged with you. My life has come and merged with me with you.
Thoughts, thoughts have merged with my heart.
If I see a glance, will the girl who gave life just leave?
If a little pain comes in one eye, will the other eye sleep?
I have crossed many dark paths to see your face.
I have come as a breeze through many paths to hear your voice.
Oh, oh, today tears are flowing down.
My life has come and merged with you. My life has come and merged with me with you.
Thoughts, thoughts have merged with my heart. Moon, moon has merged with this sky.
Like rain, like rain, I have fallen and merged with the earth. Like a heart, like a heart, I have blended with your food.
Today, I have merged with you. Thoughts, thoughts have filled your heart.
